properties.name: app.version
properties.description: Application version displayed in API responses and health endpoint.

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 secret used to sign JWT tokens. Must be at least 256 bits in production.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token validity duration in milliseconds. Default: 86400000 (24 hours).

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins permitted by CORS policy.

properties.name: membership.pricing.silver
properties.description: Monthly price (INR) for the Silver membership tier.

properties.name: membership.pricing.gold
properties.description: Monthly price (INR) for the Gold membership tier.

properties.name: membership.pricing.platinum
properties.description: Monthly price (INR) for the Platinum membership tier.

properties.name: membership.scheduler.expire-subscriptions
properties.description: Cron expression for the daily job that marks expired subscriptions. Default: 1 AM every day.

properties.name: membership.scheduler.process-renewals
properties.description: Cron expression for the daily auto-renewal processing job. Default: 1:05 AM every day.
